title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a digital creator struggling to sell courses online due to Teachable or Gumroad restrictions in your country or region? Perhaps PayPal, Stripe, or Payhip won't let you create a store because of geographical or banking limitations. You're not alone – in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, and the Philippines, conventional platforms often block access to digital commerce. The good news is that there's a permanent structural alternative using crypto-native infrastructure, which we'll explore below.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you sign up for Teachable or Gumroad, you get access to a range of features, including course creation tools, payment processing, and marketing resources. However, these platforms often require you to provide sensitive information, such as your personal and financial details, which can be a major concern for creators in restricted countries. In contrast, using NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor, allows you to create a store without sharing any personal info, making it a more secure option for international sellers. Meanwhile, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides a comprehensive overview of your transactions, order management, and real-time analytics, giving you complete visibility and control over your digital business.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Teachable and Gumroad often impose geographical restrictions on their services, blocking access to creators in certain countries or regions. This is typically due to the need to comply with international regulations and avoid potential legal issues. On the other hand, NOWPayments operates on a decentralized network, making it possible to process payments from anywhere in the world without the need for KYC (know-your-customer) or AML (anti-money laundering) checks. This means that creators in restricted countries can use NOWPayments to sell their digital products without worrying about platform restrictions or account closures.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, NOWPayments offers instant automated delivery of digital products, ensuring that customers receive their purchases immediately after making a payment. This is in contrast to Teachable and Gumroad, which often take a few days to process payments and deliver products. In terms of fees, NOWPayments charges a flat rate of 0.5% + $0.05 per transaction, making it a more cost-effective option for creators who need to process high volumes of payments. Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) helps you keep track of your transactions and fees, giving you complete control over your digital business.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Teachable and Gumroad require creators to manually deliver digital products after receiving payment, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine ($49.99) offers automated delivery of digital products, ensuring that customers receive their purchases instantly after making a payment. This is made possible by the integration of NOWPayments, which provides instant payment verification and delivery of digital products.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator looking to sell courses online without Teachable or Gumroad restrictions, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's crypto-native infrastructure offer a viable alternative. With NOWPayments, you can create a store without sharing personal info, and with Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99), you'll get complete visibility and control over your transactions and orders. Whether you're from a restricted country or simply looking for a more secure and cost-effective option, this combo is worth considering.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, Stripe has strict geographical restrictions in place, and creators from these countries may not be able to use their services. However, with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99), you can create a store and process payments without the need for Stripe or any other traditional payment processor.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
